## Data and Reproducibility

Due to size and reproducibility considerations, raw cached files (PDF/HTML downloads) are not included in this repository.

All experiments and the final system operate on the processed dataset:

- data/processed/resources_text.jsonl
- data/processed/resources_unified.jsonl

These files contain the extracted and cleaned text used for retrieval and evaluation.

The full extraction pipeline is provided and can be rerun if needed, although some external links may no longer be accessible.
